name: balanced
description: Higher-quality experts: Q4_K gate/up + Q2_K down (bigger than iq2, less lossy)
_note: Quant-level preset (swap `imatrix` for your domain). deepseek4-quantize can only PRODUCE iq2_xxs, q2_k, q4_k, q8_0 (ds4q_can_quantize); q3_k/iq3_xxs are not producible. Q4_K gate/up keeps far more of the experts than iq2 while the q2_k down stays small. Non-listed families copied from template (Q8_0).
